model_preference.description: Preferred model/provider keys in priority order.

deprecated_by.description: If this contract is deprecated, the contract ID that supersedes it (DD-157).

name.description: Contract identifier. Root namespace is implied for first-party contracts (e.g. crm-v1); org-scoped contracts use an org-slug/ prefix (e.g. acme-labs/widget-v1) (DD-157).

operations.description: Specific operations required from this service.

service.description: Abstract service name (e.g. email, tasks, calendar, vault).

agent.description: Agent name that executes this skill (key in agents dict).

briefing.description: Declares this skill as a Today briefing-card provider (v1.8, DD-211). The harness's BriefingRegistry surfaces the skill's most-recent output as a card on Today. Skills typically declaring this: digest, audit, summary, status.

card_id.description: Briefing card identifier on the Today surface (DD-211). Convention: <pack>-<short> for cross-pack uniqueness (e.g. home-maintenance-monthly-audit).

dismissal.description: Dismissal scope (DD-211 Q3). per-day = resets midnight (digests). per-version = don't re-show same alert; do show new ones. sticky = until user unpins (pinned cards). none = situational awareness, not items to action (status cards). When omitted, the harness infers from card type.

priority.description: Initial card pin priority — lower numbers float higher in the Today stack (DD-211). User-reorderable at runtime.

refresh_interval.description: ISO-8601 duration or shorthand (1h, 6h, 1d) controlling background refresh cadence (DD-211). Defaults: 6h for digests, 1h for status cards, on-demand only for inbox-status-style cards.

category.description: Skill category — what role this skill plays in the workflow (v1.2).

depends_on.description: Skills that must complete before this one.

graph.description: Execution graph topology (v1.6 base + v1.8 expansion, DD119/DD123/DD126/DD214). react-extract = ReAct + JSON extraction (default). react = lightweight, no extraction. react-verify = ReAct + deterministic verification + refinement. cascade = classify → react → escalate (tiered cost). gate = classifier-then-route (v1.8). critique-refine = author + critic loop, used for digests/summaries (v1.8). plan-execute = explicit plan step before execution, used for high-blast-radius writes (v1.8).

graph_config.description: Graph-specific configuration (v1.6, DD126). Used with cascade/gate graphs for multi-tier routing. Tier-named fields (v1.8) preferred over model-pinned fields — model-pinned couples the pack to a specific provider SKU and prevents local-LLM dispatch (DD214).

classify_model.description: DEPRECATED in v1.8 — use classify_tier instead. Model identifier for the classify tier (e.g. claude-haiku-4-5-20251001). Pinning a model SKU prevents local-LLM dispatch and couples the pack to a specific provider; tier-based routing is portable.

classify_tier.description: Tier name for the classify stage (v1.8, DD214). Preferred over classify_model — the router resolves tier → model per provider, so packs stay portable across cloud and local backends.

confidence_threshold.description: ClassifyNode confidence cutoff. Items at or above threshold short-circuit to extraction.

critique_criteria.description: Critique-refine criteria the critic evaluates against (v1.8). Examples: completeness, accuracy, tone, actionability.

escalation_model.description: DEPRECATED in v1.8 — use escalation_tier instead. Model identifier for escalation when the react tier exhausts its budget.

escalation_tier.description: Tier name for escalation when the primary stage exhausts its budget (v1.8, DD214). Preferred over escalation_model.

max_critique_rounds.description: Maximum critic→refine cycles before forced acceptance (v1.8).

routes.description: Gate graph routing table (v1.8). Maps classifier output labels to downstream sub-skill names.

inputs.description: Skill-level user inputs, same shape as config.user_inputs (v1.2).

type.description: Output type (e.g. vault_note, task, notification, report).

prompt.description: Detailed LLM prompt. Can reference {{service.operation}} syntax.

services_used.description: Services and operations this skill actually calls (v1.2).

tunable_size_budget.description: Maximum total character length of substituted tunable values per dispatch (v1.10, DD184). Defaults to 2000. Skills with large enum_array or string_array tunables can raise this; harness enforces and falls back to defaults on overrun with a user-visible warning.

tunables.description: Pack-authored typed tunables exposed to users (v1.10, DD184). Each entry declares a key, type, constraints, default, and description. Skill body references via {{tunable.key}} substitution. Override files at agent-harness/skills/overrides/{pack}/{skill}.md set per-user values.

tunables_require_review.description: When true, override values for this skill must be human-reviewed before use (v1.10, DD184). Set on security-sensitive skills (anything touching cidr_array, exec, or external write surfaces). Validation failures fail closed instead of falling back to defaults.

webhook_name.description: Name of the webhook that triggers this skill (v1.4, DD113). Links to a webhooks[] entry name or a HooksConfig webhook name.

advanced.description: When true, GUI surfaces hide this tunable behind an Advanced disclosure. Use for tunables most users should not touch.

default.description: Default value used when no override is present, when override fails validation, or when override exceeds tunable_size_budget.

description.description: One-line user-facing description shown in the Stallari Home Skills tab and Obsidian skill-tuner plugin.

key.description: Tunable identifier (snake_case). Referenced in skill body as {{tunable.key}}. Must be unique within the skill.

max_items.description: Maximum array length (string_array, enum_array, effort_ref_array, cidr_array).

type.description: Closed type vocabulary. int/float take min/max; string takes pattern/max_length; enum/enum_array take values; string_array/enum_array take max_items; effort_ref_array is Bases-backed (vault wikilinks); cidr_array is IP-family-aware; duration is ISO-8601; bool is true/false.
Input type (e.g. string, number, boolean, choice, time).

auth.description: Verification method for inbound webhook requests.

path.description: URL path suffix for the webhook endpoint (e.g. /hooks/tech-support).

schedule.description: Optional cron expression for the entire workflow.

after.description: Skills that must complete before this step.

skill.description: Skill name to execute (must exist in skills array).

description: Schema for pack manifests (stallari-plugin.yaml with pack: field). Public Pack Spec v1.0/v1.1/v1.2/v1.3/v1.4/v1.5/v1.6/v1.7/v1.8/v1.9/v1.10 (DD92, DD99, DD104, DD113, DD119, DD126, DD145/DD146, DD152, DD163, DD184, DD-214). v1.8 (DD-214): briefing: skill block, tier-named graph_config fields, full graph enum (gate/critique-refine/plan-execute), pack-scoped guardrail-ID semantics, runtime notification_* result-envelope fields routed by harness to stallari/{pack}/{category} via supervised ntfy add-on (DD-191).

access.description: Access control. Public = visible to everyone. Private = org-scoped, visible only to authenticated org members (v1.3, DD104).

agents.description: Named agent definitions (dict of name → agent config).

author_type.description: Author provenance. first-party = published and maintained by Stallari.

contracts.description: Additional service contracts this pack introduces. Only permitted for sealed+certified packs (v1.1, DD-157 namespacing).

data.description: Mandatory data access policy. Enforced by sandbox at runtime.

phones_home.description: Whether pack calls external APIs beyond declared services.

description.description: One-line summary of what this pack does.

key_delivery.description: Key delivery mechanism (e.g. paddle, registry-escrow, direct).

method.description: Encryption method for sealed pack prompts (e.g. aes-256-gcm).

forked_from.description: Fork provenance — which pack and version this was forked from (v1.2).

version.description: Version of the original pack that was forked.

guardrails.description: Platform guardrail rules — sealed text, metadata in clear (v1.7, DD145).

id.description: Rule identifier, pack-scoped (v1.8 clarification, DD-214). The same id (e.g. data-001) inside two different packs does NOT collide — the registry namespaces by pack at display time. No <pack>- prefix needed; keep ids short and copy-paste-friendly.

herald.description: Capability announcements for onboarding and feature discovery (v1.7, DD146).

icon.description: Relative URL path to icon asset for marketplace display (e.g. '/icons/stallari-core.svg').

integrity.description: Registry-computed content integrity hash (v1.9, DD163). Set at publish time.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of canonical pack content.

organization.description: Owning organisation slug. Required when access is private (v1.3, DD104).

readiness.description: Testing completeness. production = all certification checklist items pass. beta = partially tested. experimental = untested. stub = scaffolded but not functional.

readme.description: Inline README content (v1.2). Mandatory when visibility is sealed (enforced by validator, not schema).

recommends.description: Soft requirements — missing services degrade gracefully.

requires.description: Hard requirements — missing services prevent pack execution.

sharing.description: Sharing scope within orgs. 'family' allows family org members to use without separate purchase. 'team' for team orgs. 'org' for any org type (v1.8, DD152).

skills.description: Ordered skill list. At least one required.

tier.description: DEPRECATED — use author_type + readiness. Legacy trust tier. Certified = first-party or audited. Verified = reviewed. Community = unreviewed. Either tier or both author_type + readiness should be present.

visibility.description: Visibility mode. Open = public and forkable. Sealed = prompts encrypted at rest.

title: Stallari Pack Manifest
